message:
🐛 Fix mission sidebar content and input overflow (#1610)

- Add table/thead/th/td markdown renderers with horizontal scroll
  wrapper so tables don't get clipped in the 500px sidebar
- Change prose container from overflow-hidden to overflow-x-auto
  to allow horizontal scrolling for wide content
- Add min-w-0 to flex containers (root, messages, input area) so
  flex children properly constrain to parent width
- Style table headers/cells with proper padding, borders, and
  word-break for long values

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
